name: BITBOX MK2
subtitle: Intuitive Sampling Module
summary: Full-featured Eurorack sampler with a 3.5-inch touchscreen. Records, plays back, slices, loops, and granularizes samples up to 4 GB streamed from microSD. 16 clip slots, stereo I/O, 8 CV inputs, MIDI in/out, and a slot-launching grid interface. Also runs fxbox (effects) and synthbox (wavetable) firmware.
